Uses of Package
com.example.battleship.controller

Packages that use com.example.battleship.controller
Package
Description
com.example.battleship.controller
 
  • Classes in com.example.battleship.controller used by com.example.battleship.controller
    Class
    Description
    CombatController
    Handles HU-2 (the human player firing at the machine's board) and HU-4 (the machine automatically firing back).
    GamePhase
    Which phase the single main screen is currently showing.
    MainGameController
    The single entry point that wires the whole game together.
    ShipPlacementController
    Handles HU-1: letting the human player place their fleet manually, one ship at a time, by clicking a cell on their own board.
    ShipPlacementController.RotateKeyHandler
    Toggles ShipPlacementController.currentOrientation on the "R" key and refreshes the preview ghost so the rotation is immediately visible -- a private inner class (rather than a lambda) so the rotate behavior reads as a named, self-contained unit of keyboard handling.
